OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Golden Gateway Center, is present. Represented by Maye Xiao.
Attorney, Daniel Stern, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Laura Haber, is present.
Attorney, Umung Varma , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Penelope Pahl, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept.305B , for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-25-2010 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Off Calendar
